questions.text: A number is divisible by 3 if sum of its digits is divisible by:
questions.explanation: Divisibility rule for 3: If sum of digits is divisible by 3, the number is divisible by 3.

questions.text: A number ending in 0 is divisible by 10.
questions.explanation: Any number ending in 0 is divisible by 10. Example: 50, 100, 230 are all divisible by 10.

questions.correctAnswer: A number that reads the same forwards and backwards.
questions.explanation: Palindrome numbers: 121, 1331, 12321. They read the same from left to right and right to left.

questions.text: A number is divisible by 9 if sum of its digits is divisible by ________.
questions.explanation: Divisibility rule for 9: If sum of digits is divisible by 9, the number is divisible by 9.
